title: The RAPP Ecosystem — Full End-to-End Spec
summary: The single canonical description of the entire RAPP ecosystem: every operator capability domain, the one agent that drives them via natural language, the schemas, the repos, the end-to-end journeys, and the four-leg drift triangle that keeps this spec, the agent, and the two mirror repos in sync.
first_principle: use everyone else's hardware to run the network
identity_format: Eternity rappid:@<owner>/<slug>:<64hex>  (64hex = sha256 of the master public key for keyed organisms, or a stable UUID/commit-derived hash for keyless; independent of the slug — the hash is the join key, never the slug; kind lives in the record, not the string; CONSTITUTION Art. XXXIV.1/XXXVI.1, locked 2026-06-03). Legacy v2 is read-forever and canonicalized, never emitted.

lexicon.status: seals at rapp-body genesis (lexicon_sha pinned in the genesis frame)

mirrors.note: This exact JSON is published byte-identical to two independent grail repos. Divergence between them IS drift — the agent's `verify` action sha256-compares them.
mirrors.human_bible: https://kody-w.github.io/RAPP-Bible/#specs (renders this spec for a non-technical reader)

the_one_agent.contract: Drop this ONE file into a brainstem's agents/ directory and an operator can, through natural language alone, utilize the ENTIRE ecosystem end-to-end: orient in it, bootstrap identity + a fresh brainstem + a door, operate every core scale (estate / neighborhood / cubby / egg / super-RAR), record lineage, and INSTALL any specialist agent for everything deeper. It is airdroppable and offline-safe: it embeds a baseline of the whole map so it works in the woods, and `refresh` re-syncs from the global grail when online.
the_one_agent.why_not_a_monolith: The ecosystem is built FROM single-file agents (ANTIPATTERNS §1). The god agent does not reimplement all ~30 specialists — it REACHES them. Its superpower is `install`: pull any agent from RAR / the stores / a neighborhood's rar on demand. Deep specialist work stays in its own agent (see specialist_agents).

fractal_scales.is: one *_agent.py — single file, single class, single perform(), single metadata dict
one planted seed (one rappid) with a front door + doorman
fractal_scales.rappid: its own Eternity rappid in rappid.json, minted once

fractal_scales.is: a community-with-a-purpose; a GitHub repo is the gate. Public or PRIVATE (collaborator-gated). Has members + per-member cubbies
fractal_scales.channels: NEIGHBORHOOD_PROTOCOL §5a–d (WebRTC tether, Issues, PRs, raw fetch)

fractal_scales.is: ONE operator's union of everything they've planted + joined; two-tier (public discovery + private bones, Art. XLVIII)
fractal_scales.rappid: the operator's personal Eternity rappid is the spine — the global passport
fractal_scales.catalog: ~/.brainstem/estate.json (created[] + member[]); each entry stores ONLY {rappid, added_at, via}

fractal_scales.is: an emergent mesh of estates through shared neighborhoods; federations of metropolises emerge at planet scale

primitives.name: rappid
primitives.is: the global identity + address. From any rappid, with zero auth, every canonical URL is computable by string parsing
primitives.parser: tools/door_address.py::door_from_rappid (single parser; agents inline a mirror)

primitives.name: door
primitives.is: the public surface URL where a thing is reachable; 9 canonical URLs derived from the rappid; PRIVATE doors 404 to outsiders (the guard); a 'dark door' has no public front door at all

primitives.name: card
primitives.is: the trade-card / introduction view + granular published permissions

primitives.name: tether
primitives.is: the four channel types — WebRTC, Issues, PRs, raw fetch — carrying the twin-chat envelope

primitives.name: trust scope
primitives.is: personal / neighborhood / public swarm, gated by facets

osi_layers.name: Substrate
osi_layers.is: the physical layer — GitHub Pages + raw.githubusercontent.com, LAN, file://, sneakernet eggs

osi_layers.name: Identity
osi_layers.is: the rappid layer — Eternity address, minted once, read forever

osi_layers.name: Discovery
osi_layers.is: lineage + catalog — parent_rappid chain, estate.json, RAR, rapp-god/rapp-map

osi_layers.name: Channels
osi_layers.is: transport — WebRTC tether, Issues, PRs, raw fetch (NEIGHBORHOOD_PROTOCOL §5)

osi_layers.name: Trust scope
osi_layers.is: session/auth — personal/neighborhood/public, collaborator-gated private doors, sealed channel (§8 AES-256-GCM)

osi_layers.name: Envelope
osi_layers.is: presentation — the egg cartridge family, the twin-chat envelope, |||VOICE||| / |||TWIN||| slots

osi_layers.name: Application
osi_layers.is: the agent + /chat layer — single-file agents, organs, the agent-built web (rionet/rio)

drift_triangle.purpose: Four independent representations of the same truth so any divergence is detectable. No single point can silently drift.

legs.holds: the executable contract — its action enum is the capability surface
the human-facing rendering of this spec — the one-source share

checks: sha256(rapp-god/ecosystem-spec.json) == sha256(rapp-map/ecosystem-spec.json)  — the two independent mirrors must match
rapp_agent.py action enum  ⊇  ecosystem-spec.json.required_actions  — the agent implements at least every required action
RAPP-Bible spec_version == ecosystem-spec.json.version  — the bible is pinned to the spec it renders
every capability_domain capability tagged native maps to a live action in the agent's enum
drift_triangle.run_via: rapp_agent.py action=verify  (one agent self-checks all legs)  — or summon the `ecosystem-sync` swarm to re-derive the whole spec from the live ecosystem and reconcile drift anywhere.

operator_journeys.flow: drop rapp_agent.py → 'who am I / set me up' (mint → scaffold → plant) → 'what exists' (spec/ecosystem/find, all embedded offline)

operator_journeys.journey: join a neighbor's neighborhood and use what they built
operator_journeys.flow: door (resolve their rappid) → mount → join → browse → super_rar where=neighborhood query=X → load (stream git-invisible) / install (pull an agent)

operator_journeys.journey: carve a digital organism out of my estate and share it
operator_journeys.flow: super_rar where=local query=X → cubby_collect (group the hits) → cubby_egg → mount a neighborhood → hatch (mirror it in) — records a bond

operator_journeys.journey: reach any deep capability I don't have
operator_journeys.flow: route need='...' → it names the specialist + the exact install → install → now invoke that specialist via NL
refresh (pull the grail) → spec (freshest) → verify (4-leg drift check)

schemas_ref: The full ~80-schema registry lives in ECOSYSTEM_MAP.md §5 (rapp-*/N.M + brainstem-egg/*). Canonical families: identity (rapp/1, formerly rapp-rappid/2.0; rapp-eternity/1.0, rapp-door/1.0, rapp-estate/1.1, rapp-facets/1.0), cartridges (brainstem-egg/2.2-organism|2.2-rapplication|2.3-session|2.3-neighborhood|2.3-estate|2.3-cubby), neighborhoods (rapp-neighborhood/1.0, rapp-neighborhood-members/1.0, rapp-rar-index/1.0), private-cubby (rapp-cubby/1.0, rapp-super-rar/1.0, rapp-payphone-dial/1.0), federation (rapp-twin-chat/1.0, rapp-public-facets/1.0, rapp-network beacon), governance (rapp-ecosystem-graph/1.0, rapp-canon/1.0, rapp-drift-report/1.0), neuron mesh (rapp-neuron/1.0, rapp-neuron-mesh/1.0).

kernel & install: RAPP (species root: kernel + specs + curl|bash front door)
rapp-installer (installer; canonical front door now in RAPP)
identity & registry: rapp-eternity (identity authority — the sole identity standard; schema rapp-eternity/1.0; rapp-rappid-spec/2.0 defers to it)
rapp-estate (estate spec/template — the Constitutionally-mandated <handle>/rapp-estate public + <handle>/rapp-estate-private family, Art. XLVIII; schema rapp-estate/1.1)
rapp-god (registry of every part + version; drift observatory; hosts this spec)
rapp-map (which repo houses which part; hosts this spec; the neuron mesh)
bible & spec: RAPP-Bible (the one-source human hub; renders this spec)

_meta.generated_from: the swarm-verified coverage audit (verify-god-agent-coverage) + ECOSYSTEM_MAP.md + ECOSYSTEM.md + OSI.md + the agent's embedded ECOSYSTEM_PARTS
_meta.regenerate: summon the `ecosystem-sync` swarm — it re-derives this spec from the live ecosystem and reconciles all four legs
_meta.note: capability_domains and required_actions are appended by the spec builder once the agent's final action enum is confirmed; this file is then published byte-identical to rapp-god and rapp-map.

required_actions_groups.note: The live agent's metadata enum must be a superset of existing+added. `action=verify` asserts this; mismatch = drift.
